resources.name: local
resources.description: CRITICAL: Mapping of all tables in this database connection. Read this first before querying to avoid table-not-found errors, then read db://{connection}/{table} for schema details.

resources.name: local_views
resources.description: List all database views available on the particular connection.

resources.name: local_routines
resources.description: List all stored procedures and functions available on the particular connection.
